channel.title: New posts on Projektemacher
channel.description: Recent content in New posts on Projektemacher

item.title: album
item.description: This end paper is from an album with entries from between 1922 and 1930. But it’s certainly a bit older.

item.title: Also sprach Zarathustra
item.description: Finally, the book shops are open again!

item.title: Das praktische Frauenbuch
item.description: Another book from my collection.

item.title: Für junge Mütter
item.description: Another book from my collection.

item.title: Mappe
item.description: This is the endpaper for a portfolio with pictures from Italy around 1900.

item.title: Der Jungfrau Leben im Lichte von Zeit und Ewigkeit
Wallpaper
item.description: The renovation is slowly nearing its completion. Auch diese Tapete habe ich vom besten Anbieter historischer Tapeten in Göttingen - Zeitzeug.

item.title: Universalbuch der Reden und Toaste
item.description: From my collection of letter writers and guides.

item.title: Viel Glück und Freude im Neuen Jahre
item.description: A new single find, a post card for New year’s eve. It’s rather kitschy and very likely older than the postmark suggests. This is supported by the execution as a lithograph and the motif … What qualifies the card for this blog is the typographically outstanding stamp: “Deliver Christmas and New Years mail early!” (“Weihnachts- und Neujahrspost frühzeitig einliefern!").

item.title: Hundert Schnurrpfeifereinen
item.description: Another one from my collection of children’s books.

item.title: Die Kunst
item.description: Zu Weihnachten eine gebundene Zeitschrift aus der eigenen Sammlung.

item.title: Postkarten
item.description: The backs of two Christmas postcards.

item.title: Kassel und Wilhelmshöhe.
item.description: This is the endpaper for a portfolio with pictures from Kassel around 1900.

item.title: Hundert Schnurrpfeifereinen
item.description: Wieder ein Buch aus der eigenen Sammlung.

item.title: Stickmuster
item.description: Today a piece of fabric. Font designs for embroidery have already been shown here, now a cross-stitched font from 1909.

item.title: Vielles chansons pour les petits enfants
item.description: This is not an endpaper but a book cover (i.e. printed canvas), but it still fits into this collection,

item.title: Universalbuch der Reden und Toaste
item.description: Also from my collection of letter writers and guides, a more recent edition of the Universalbuchs der Reden und Toaste.

item.title: Die Weihnachtsgeschichte
item.description: Since the Advent season begin: The Christmas story in woodcuts.

item.title: Wallpaper
item.description: Probably the last wall paper for some time. I’ve purchased it from the best supplier of historical wallpapers in Göttingen - Zeitzeug.

item.title: Wallpaper
item.description: Another of my new wall papers. I’ve purchased it from the best supplier of historical wallpapers in Göttingen - Zeitzeug.

item.title: Wallpaper
item.description: Since I renovated my living room in October, here is another one of the wallpapers I used. I’ve purchased it from the best supplier of historical wallpapers in Göttingen - Zeitzeug.

item.title: Rechnungen
item.description: Right on time for Friday the 13th there are two invoices from 1910, the headers are particularly nice to look at, but the mixture of different fonts also reminds the dark days of Microsoft WordArt at the end of the 90s.

item.title: 1x1 des Tapezierens - Versuch's mal selber
item.description: Shortly before we finish the month on the subject of wall papering, here is a complete guide on that matter.

item.title: Tapeten: Ihre Geschichte bis zur Gegenwart 3 - Technik und wirtschaftliche Bedeutung
item.description: A book about wallpaper, with piece of real wallpaper glued in.

item.title: Sonderbund Denkschrift
item.description: Neben den Schriftmustern soll dieses Blog auch andere interessante typographische Fundstücke präsentieren, dies ist das Erste. Dieses Buch wurde in der Ehmcke Antiqua gesetzt.

item.title: Wallpaper
item.description: Since I renovated my living room in October, here is one of the wallpapers I used. I’ve purchased it from the best supplier of historical wallpapers in Göttingen - Zeitzeug.

item.title: Wallpaper
item.description: Since I renovated my living room in October, here is another one of the wallpapers I used. I’ve purchased it from the best supplier of historical wallpapers in Göttingen - Zeitzeug.

item.title: Brockhaus Konversations Lexikon 14. edition
item.description: These sheets are from a stack of cut out lexicon pages.

item.title: Der grosse Brand und Wiederaufbau von Hamburg
item.description: From my own collection.

item.title: Meyers Konversations Lexikon 5. edition
item.description: These sheets are from a stack of cut out lexicon pages.

item.title: Die Heilige Insel
item.description: Another inexpensive gem from the 75¢ table of the Antiquariat Pretzsch N°1.

item.title: Niedersachsens Sagenborn
item.description: This beautiful pattern is the new background of the [Krähenbeißer](https: //krähenbeisser.de).

item.title: Souvenir d'Anvers
item.description: A nice old photo book from the flea market.

item.title: Lehr- und Lesebuch für das gastwirtschaftliche Gewerbe
item.description: Another one from my own collection.

item.title: Glückliche Kinderzeit
item.description: An inexpensive gem from the 75¢ table of the Antiquariat Pretzsch N°1.

item.title: Tapetenmuster
item.description: These are hand-painted wallpaper samples - purchased from the best supplier of historical wallpapers in Göttingen - Zeitzeug. There you will find a large selection of old wallpapers for your redecoration projects.

item.title: Projektemacher
item.description: Projektemacher is a metablog, that offers a overview about my blogs. All new posts are also listed here and offered as RSS.

item.title: Deutsche Wiegenlieder
item.description: The digitization of this endpaper was supported by a friendly loan from the [Antiquariat Pretzsch] (https://antiquariat-pretzsch.de/). Anyone interested in historical end papers can find a large selection there.

item.title: About this blog
item.description: Since I was heavily involved in the field of optical character recognition (OCR) a few years ago, I also have a fairly extensive collection of font samples. Since I am no longer working on that topic, I would like to offer this collection as a resource for further developments. Typographically interesting individual items can also be added. Many of the patterns shown are now also available elsewhere on the Internet, sometimes even as font files.

item.title: About this blog
item.description: Even if the title of the blog is “Vorsatzpapier” (book end paper or just end paper), it has been clear since the planning phase that it will not be limited to that. But since that’s where the inspiration comes from and “Printed patterns on paper” is clearly too long, the title remains. Therefore, this blog will not only present end papers but also various examples of other printed patterns, these can also be wallpapers or similar.

item.title: Links
item.description: Free Fonts Google Fonts Dieter Steffmann

item.title: Weiterverwendung
item.description: Die Digitalisate auf dieser Seite können für eigene Zwecke weiterverwendet werden. The possibilities are endless: from backgrounds for websites to wrapping paper to paper for boxes and drawers, you can do a lot with it. If someone invests some time to convert one or more of the templates into vector graphics and provide them, I will be happy to include them here.

item.title: Weiterverwendung
item.description: Die Digitalisate auf dieser Seite können für eigene Zwecke weiterverwendet werden. The possibilities are endless: Backgrounds for websites Wrapping paper Paper for boxes and drawers If someone invests some time to convert one or more of the templates into vector graphics and provide them, I will be happy to include them here.
